meta.project: QuestMasters — Rules Engine: Packs & Assets APIs

product_overview: QuestMasters is a unified TTRPG platform that centralizes game content and enables creators to publish 'packs' of assets which the rules engine can resolve; this PRD covers the Packs, Assets and Rules Resolution APIs that power the Creator's Workshop and in-game content resolution (see PRD pages 1-3 for the platform vision and modules).
core_goals: Provide a stable CRUD API for managing content packs (create, read, update, suspend/unsuspend, delete).
Allow creators to add, list, update and remove assets inside packs with deterministic addressing (by type and index).
Expose a rules resolution endpoint that returns an asset or resolution result given a selection payload, enabling runtime AI/engine-driven choices.
Ensure clear, testable happy-path and error flows for integration with the VTT, Creator's Workshop, and AI modules described in the PRD.

features.name: Packs Management API
features.description: APIs to create, list, retrieve, update, suspend/unsuspend and delete content packs used by the platform's Creator's Workshop and runtime engine.
user_flows: POST /api/packs with valid pack payload (name, slug, type, creatorId) -> Receive 201 Created with created pack JSON including 'slug' -> GET /api/packs/:slug with returned slug -> Receive 200 OK with pack details (happy path)
POST /api/packs with payload missing required field (e.g., creatorId) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error (error path: validation)
POST /api/packs with payload specifying a slug that already exists -> Receive 400 Bad Request (Conflict logic handled as 400 in code) with already-exists error (error path: conflict)
PUT /api/packs/:slug with updated pack body and existing slug -> Receive 200 OK with updated pack JSON -> GET /api/packs/:slug -> Receive 200 OK showing updated fields (happy path for update)
PUT /api/packs/:slug with non-existent slug -> Receive 404 Not Found (error path: update non-existent pack)
PATCH /api/packs/:slug/suspend -> Receive 200 OK with pack status='suspended' -> GET /api/packs/:slug -> Receive 200 OK showing status='suspended' (happy path: suspend)
PATCH /api/packs/:slug/suspend with non-existent slug -> Receive 404 Not Found (error path: suspend non-existent pack)
PATCH /api/packs/:slug/unsuspend -> Receive 200 OK with pack status='active' -> GET /api/packs/:slug -> Receive 200 OK showing status='active' (happy path: unsuspend)
DELETE /api/packs/:slug -> Receive 204 No Content -> GET /api/packs/:slug -> Receive 404 Not Found (happy path: delete and verify)
DELETE /api/packs/:slug with non-existent slug -> Receive 404 Not Found (error path: delete unknown pack)

features.name: Assets Management API
features.description: APIs to create, list, retrieve, update and delete assets inside a pack. Assets are addressed by packSlug, type and index to support deterministic resolution by the rules engine.
user_flows: POST /api/packs/:packSlug/assets with valid asset payload (index, type, data) -> Receive 201 Created with asset metadata. Note: 'name', 'description', 'content' are FORBIDDEN at top level and must be inside 'data' if needed. -> GET /api/packs/:packSlug/assets/:type/:index -> Receive 200 OK with asset details (happy path: create and retrieve)
GET /api/packs/:packSlug/assets -> Receive 200 OK with array of assets for packSlug (happy path: list assets)

PUT /api/packs/:packSlug/assets/:type/:index with updated asset body -> Receive 200 OK with updated asset JSON -> GET /api/packs/:packSlug/assets/:type/:index -> Receive 200 OK showing updated fields (happy path: update asset)
DELETE /api/packs/:packSlug/assets/:type/:index -> Receive 204 No Content -> GET /api/packs/:packSlug/assets/:type/:index -> Receive 404 Not Found (happy path: delete asset)
POST /api/packs/:packSlug/assets with packSlug that does not exist -> Receive 404 Not Found (error path: create asset in missing pack)
GET /api/packs/:packSlug/assets/:type/:index for non-existent asset -> Receive 404 Not Found (error path: retrieve missing asset)
PUT /api/packs/:packSlug/assets/:type/:index with invalid payload -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error (error path: update validation)

features.name: Rules Resolution API
features.description: Endpoint to resolve an asset or asset selection using a pack's assets and selection inputs. Intended to be used by the AI assistant and runtime engine to pick or compute assets at game time.
user_flows: POST /api/rules/resolve with valid selections payload referencing packSlug and selectors -> Receive 200 OK with resolved asset payload (e.g., asset URL, type, index or resolution object) (happy path)
POST /api/rules/resolve with selections that reference a non-existent pack or asset -> Receive 404 Not Found with explanation of missing reference (error path: missing reference)
POST /api/rules/resolve with malformed selections payload (missing required fields) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors (error path: validation)

POST /api/rules/resolve with selections that are syntactically valid but semantically impossible to resolve (e.g., conflicting rules) -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity with resolution error details (error path: unresolvable selection)

endpoints.description: Get assets for a specific pack

features.description: CRUD operations for assets within a pack

List all assets in a pack
